description: Brevo is a customer engagement platform for email, SMS, WhatsApp, marketing automation, contacts, CRM, and related messaging workflows. It provides tools for sending transactional messages, managing campaigns and contacts, and integrating account data with external applications and AI assistants.
summary: Brevo exposes a REST API at https://api.brevo.com/v3, an MCP server at https://mcp.brevo.com/v1/brevo/mcp, and a `brevo` CLI (`@getbrevo/cli`); the REST API supports API key auth and documented OAuth 2.0 app credentials, while the MCP server uses a bearer MCP token.
